name: wintergirls
description: Laurie Halse Anderson's Wintergirls — a raw, unflinching novel about anorexia, grief, and the long road to recovery, told through the voice of an eighteen-year-old girl.
useCase: Understanding eating disorders, grieving someone lost to the same illness, family dynamics and treatment, choosing recovery, supporting a loved one.
knownRisks: This novel depicts eating disorders in graphic detail — may be triggering for those struggling with similar issues
Not a substitute for professional mental health treatment
Handle with care and recommend professional resources
